description: Daryl Xu discusses the evolution of crypto gaming infrastructure, emphasizing the need for shared risk between game developers and publishers. He highlights the importance of providing upfront capital to developers to foster breakout hits and the synergy with the base ecosystem for gaming growth. Xu also touches on the user experience between B3 and base, aiming to create a seamless transition for players [t=1:36 - t=237:57].
topic_summary: Daryl Xu outlines the challenges and opportunities in crypto gaming, advocating for a supportive funding model for developers and exploring the integration of gaming within the base ecosystem.
